questions.question: Which is more important in a partner?
questions.optionB: Is your emotional rock

questions.question: Which is the better date?
questions.optionB: Cozy night in cooking together

questions.question: Which is the bigger green flag?
questions.optionA: Gets along great with your friends
questions.optionB: Gets along great with your family

questions.question: Which is worse in a relationship?
questions.optionB: Someone who's too controlling about time

questions.question: Which matters more long-term?
questions.optionB: Shared values and goals

questions.question: Which is the better approach to conflict?
questions.optionB: Cool off first then discuss

questions.question: Which is more romantic?
questions.optionB: Small private thoughtful acts

questions.question: Which friend is more valuable?
questions.optionA: One who always tells you the honest truth
questions.optionB: One who always has your back no matter what

questions.question: Which is the better love story setup?
questions.optionA: Childhood friends who fall in love
questions.optionB: Strangers with instant chemistry

questions.question: Which is more important for friendship?
questions.optionB: Picking up right where you left off after months

questions.question: Which living arrangement is better for couples?
questions.optionB: Have your own separate spaces too

questions.question: Which is the bigger relationship dealbreaker?
questions.optionB: Terrible taste in food

questions.question: Which vacation style works better for couples?
questions.optionB: Relaxing and doing nothing together

questions.question: Which is more important?
questions.optionB: Your partner notices when you're upset

questions.question: Which is the harder conversation to have?
questions.optionA: Telling a friend they hurt your feelings
questions.optionB: Telling a friend you disagree with their life choices

questions.question: Which is worse?
questions.optionA: A partner who overshares about your relationship
questions.optionB: A partner who never talks about you to anyone

questions.question: Which pet peeve is worse in a roommate?
questions.optionA: Messy but fun to live with
questions.optionB: Clean but has a ton of rules

questions.question: Which is the better way to meet someone?
questions.optionB: Meeting through mutual friends

questions.question: Which is more important in a friendship?
questions.optionB: Always being honest even when it's hard

questions.question: Which is the better surprise?
questions.optionA: Surprise party planned by your partner
questions.optionB: Surprise trip planned by your partner

questions.question: Which is harder?
questions.optionB: Relationship where you work together daily

questions.question: Which morning routine is better for couples?
questions.optionA: Wake up at the same time together
questions.optionB: Let each person follow their own schedule

questions.question: Which is the better apology style?
questions.optionB: Making it up through actions

questions.question: Which is more attractive?
questions.optionB: Humility

questions.question: Which is better for a relationship?
questions.optionB: Sleep on it and talk tomorrow with fresh eyes
